title: QA: scan upstream UI surface for new hardcoded English (ZAI-172 sync batch)
description:
Scan the UI files changed in the upstream sync ([ZAI-172](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-172)) for new hardcoded English strings not wrapped in `t()`.

## Scope — changed UI surface files only

```
ui/src/components/ActivityRow.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueAssignedBacklogNotice.tsx  (NEW)
ui/src/components/IssueBlockedNotice.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueChatThread.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueMonitorActivityCard.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueProperties.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueRow.tsx
ui/src/components/IssueScheduledRetryCard.tsx    (NEW)
ui/src/components/IssuesList.tsx
ui/src/components/NewIssueDialog.tsx
ui/src/components/Sidebar.tsx
ui/src/pages/CompanySkills.tsx
ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx
ui/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx
ui/src/pages/Routines.tsx
```

Do NOT scan the whole `ui/src` tree — bounded scope per ZAI-77 playbook.

## What to look for

Find any English string literals rendered to the DOM (JSX text, string props like `placeholder`, `title`, `aria-label`, `label`, button text, tooltip content) that:
- Are NOT wrapped in `t()` or `useTranslation`
- Do NOT already exist in any locale namespace under `ui/src/locales/en/`

## Output format

Post a comment on this issue listing each finding as:

```
file:line | "hardcoded string" | context (JSX prop / text node)
```

If no new hardcoded English found, comment "No new untranslated strings detected in this sync batch."

## Acceptance criteria

- All 15 files scanned
- Findings posted as comment on this issue
- No whole-tree scan (only the listed files)
